requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R-600a (Isobutane) Handling & Charge Documentation (appliance-level via NS/IEC 60335-2-24; no EU-style F-Gas Regulation)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——R-600a（异丁烷）处理与充注量文件（器具层面经NS/IEC 60335-2-24；无欧盟式氟气体法规）
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——R-600a（異丁烷）處理與充注量文件（器具層面經NS/IEC 60335-2-24；無歐盟式氟氣體法規）

summary.en: For Nepal, refrigerant control of household refrigerators is handled at the appliance-safety level rather than through an EU-style standalone F-Gas Regulation with quota/registration. R-600a (isobutane) is a low-GWP hydrocarbon refrigerant widely used in modern refrigerators and is well-positioned for Nepal. Because R-600a is flammable (A3), the governing requirements sit within the adopted NS/IEC 60335-2-24 safety standard — in particular its flammable-refrigerant provisions (charge-quantity limits relative to room/cabinet volume, construction and marking requirements, and the warning/handling instructions in Annex AA of IEC 60335-2-24). The appliance must therefore carry the correct flammable-refrigerant markings, the charge mass must be within the standard's limits, and the documentation/instructions must reflect safe handling. Nepal, as a party to the Montreal Protocol and its Kigali Amendment, has HFC phase-down commitments at the national/import-policy level, which favours R-600a over HFCs like R-134a, but day-to-day product compliance is via NS/IEC 60335-2-24 plus importer/customs. Status: INFORMATIONAL.
summary.zh: 对尼泊尔而言，家用电冰箱的制冷剂管控在器具安全层面处理，而非通过欧盟式带配额/注册的独立氟气体法规。R-600a（异丁烷）为低GWP碳氢制冷剂，广泛用于现代电冰箱，对尼泊尔条件良好。因R-600a可燃（A3），主导要求位于采纳的NS/IEC 60335-2-24安全标准内——尤其其可燃制冷剂条款（相对房间/箱体容积的充注量限制、结构与标识要求，及IEC 60335-2-24附件AA的警告/处理说明）。因此器具须带正确的可燃制冷剂标识，充注质量须在标准限值内，文件/说明须反映安全处理。尼泊尔作为《蒙特利尔议定书》及其基加利修正案缔约方，在国家/进口政策层面有HFC削减承诺，利好R-600a相对R-134a等HFC，但日常产品合规经NS/IEC 60335-2-24加进口商/海关。状态：信息性。
summary.zht: 對尼泊爾而言，家用電冰箱的製冷劑管控在器具安全層面處理，而非通過歐盟式帶配額/註冊的獨立氟氣體法規。R-600a（異丁烷）為低GWP碳氫製冷劑，廣泛用於現代電冰箱，對尼泊爾條件良好。因R-600a可燃（A3），主導要求位於採納的NS/IEC 60335-2-24安全標準內——尤其其可燃製冷劑條款（相對房間/箱體容積的充注量限制、結構與標識要求，及IEC 60335-2-24附件AA的警告/處理說明）。因此器具須帶正確的可燃製冷劑標識，充注質量須在標準限值內，文件/說明須反映安全處理。尼泊爾作為《蒙特利爾議定書》及其基加利修正案締約方，在國家/進口政策層面有HFC削減承諾，利好R-600a相對R-134a等HFC，但日常產品合規經NS/IEC 60335-2-24加進口商/海關。狀態：資訊性。

standards_or_laws: NS / IEC 60335-2-24 — flammable-refrigerant provisions (charge limits, construction, marking) incl. Annex AA handling/warning requirements for R-600a (A3)
Montreal Protocol + Kigali Amendment — HFC phase-down at national/import-policy level (favours low-GWP R-600a over R-134a)
Appliance flammable-refrigerant marking and safe-handling instructions
No EU-style standalone F-Gas Regulation / quota / registration in Nepal

summary.en: In China, R-600a use in household refrigerators is likewise governed at appliance level by GB 4706.13-2014 (derived from IEC 60335-2-24, including flammable-refrigerant charge limits and marking), and R-600a is the mainstream refrigerant for Chinese domestic refrigerators. China is also a Montreal Protocol / Kigali party with its own HFC phase-down schedule and controls on ozone-depleting and high-GWP substances administered by MEE. The technical charge-limit and marking requirements in GB 4706.13 trace to the same IEC 60335-2-24 basis as Nepal's NS, so the underlying flammable-refrigerant safety content is closely aligned. However, Chinese CCC/GB documentation is domestic; for Nepal the charge documentation and flammable-refrigerant markings must be verified against the NS/IEC 60335-2-24 edition Nepal applies, and any HFC import-policy considerations are Nepal's, not China's.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用电冰箱使用R-600a同样在器具层面由GB 4706.13-2014管辖（源自IEC 60335-2-24，含可燃制冷剂充注量限制与标识），R-600a为中国国内电冰箱的主流制冷剂。中国亦为《蒙特利尔议定书》/基加利缔约方，有自身HFC削减时间表，并由生态环境部（MEE）管控消耗臭氧层及高GWP物质。GB 4706.13中的充注量限制与标识技术要求溯源至与尼泊尔NS相同的IEC 60335-2-24基础，故底层可燃制冷剂安全内容高度对齐。但中国CCC/GB文件属国内性质；对尼泊尔而言，充注量文件与可燃制冷剂标识须按尼泊尔适用的NS/IEC 60335-2-24版本核实，任何HFC进口政策考量属尼泊尔而非中国。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用電冰箱使用R-600a同樣在器具層面由GB 4706.13-2014管轄（源自IEC 60335-2-24，含可燃製冷劑充注量限制與標識），R-600a為中國國內電冰箱的主流製冷劑。中國亦為《蒙特利爾議定書》/基加利締約方，有自身HFC削減時間表，並由生態環境部（MEE）管控消耗臭氧層及高GWP物質。GB 4706.13中的充注量限制與標識技術要求溯源至與尼泊爾NS相同的IEC 60335-2-24基礎，故底層可燃製冷劑安全內容高度對齊。但中國CCC/GB文件屬國內性質；對尼泊爾而言，充注量文件與可燃製冷劑標識須按尼泊爾適用的NS/IEC 60335-2-24版本核實，任何HFC進口政策考量屬尼泊爾而非中國。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — flammable-refrigerant charge limits and marking (derived from IEC 60335-2-24); R-600a mainstream in China
Montreal Protocol + Kigali Amendment — China HFC phase-down; MEE controls on ODS/high-GWP substances
Chinese CCC/GB documentation is domestic (not accepted as-is by Nepal)

gap.en: R-600a is well-positioned for Nepal and the technical safety basis (IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant provisions) is essentially shared with China's GB 4706.13, so the engineering content overlaps. The practical gaps are documentation and policy-layer, not technology: (a) verify the R-600a charge mass and flammable-refrigerant markings against the specific NS/IEC 60335-2-24 edition Nepal applies (including Annex AA warnings), as part of NBSM NS conformity rather than a separate refrigerant filing; (b) ensure handling/warning instructions are present in the required local language(s); (c) treat HFC phase-down as a national/import-policy matter handled with the importer — R-600a generally aligns favourably with Nepal's Kigali commitments versus R-134a; and (d) note plainly that Nepal has no EU-style standalone F-Gas Regulation, so there is no F-Gas quota, leak-check, or operator-certification regime to satisfy at product level — the control is the appliance safety standard plus import policy. Verify current Nepal import policy and NS edition locally.
gap.zh: R-600a对尼泊尔条件良好，且技术安全基础（IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂条款）与中国GB 4706.13基本共享，工程内容重叠。实务差距在文件与政策层面，而非技术：（a）按尼泊尔适用的具体NS/IEC 60335-2-24版本核实R-600a充注质量与可燃制冷剂标识（含附件AA警告），作为NBSM NS合格评定的一部分而非单独的制冷剂申报；（b）确保处理/警告说明以所需当地语言提供；（c）将HFC削减视为与进口商处理的国家/进口政策事项——R-600a相对R-134a通常更契合尼泊尔基加利承诺；（d）明言尼泊尔不设欧盟式独立氟气体法规，故产品层面无须满足F-Gas配额、泄漏检查或操作员认证制度——管控为器具安全标准加进口政策。请向当地核实现行尼泊尔进口政策与NS版本。
gap.zht: R-600a對尼泊爾條件良好，且技術安全基礎（IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑條款）與中國GB 4706.13基本共享，工程內容重疊。實務差距在文件與政策層面，而非技術：（a）按尼泊爾適用的具體NS/IEC 60335-2-24版本核實R-600a充注質量與可燃製冷劑標識（含附件AA警告），作為NBSM NS合格評定的一部分而非單獨的製冷劑申報；（b）確保處理/警告說明以所需當地語言提供；（c）將HFC削減視為與進口商處理的國家/進口政策事項——R-600a相對R-134a通常更契合尼泊爾基加利承諾；（d）明言尼泊爾不設歐盟式獨立氟氣體法規，故產品層面無須滿足F-Gas配額、洩漏檢查或操作員認證制度——管控為器具安全標準加進口政策。請向當地核實現行尼泊爾進口政策與NS版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (appliance-level) — R-600a flammable-refrigerant charge limits and markings under NS/IEC 60335-2-24 within NBSM NS conformity; HFC phase-down handled at import-policy level; no EU-style standalone F-Gas product regime
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (appliance-level) — R-600a charge limits/marking under GB 4706.13; HFC phase-down under MEE; CCC/GB documentation domestic

source.publisher: Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology (NBSM) / Montreal Protocol Ozone Secretariat

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a is well-positioned for Nepal. Refrigerant safety is controlled at appliance level via NS/IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant provisions (charge limits, marking, Annex AA handling) within NBSM NS conformity — the same IEC basis as China's GB 4706.13, so test content overlaps. Verify charge mass, markings and local-language warnings against the Nepal NS edition. HFC phase-down is an import-policy matter favouring R-600a over R-134a. Nepal has no EU-style standalone F-Gas Regulation. Confirm current NS edition and import policy with NBSM and the importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a对尼泊尔条件良好。制冷剂安全在器具层面经NS/IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂条款（充注量限制、标识、附件AA处理）于NBSM NS合格评定内管控——与中国GB 4706.13同一IEC基础，故检测内容重叠。请按尼泊尔NS版本核实充注质量、标识及当地语言警告。HFC削减为利好R-600a相对R-134a的进口政策事项。尼泊尔不设欧盟式独立氟气体法规。请向NBSM及进口商确认现行NS版本与进口政策。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a對尼泊爾條件良好。製冷劑安全在器具層面經NS/IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑條款（充注量限制、標識、附件AA處理）於NBSM NS合格評定內管控——與中國GB 4706.13同一IEC基礎，故檢測內容重疊。請按尼泊爾NS版本核實充注質量、標識及當地語言警告。HFC削減為利好R-600a相對R-134a的進口政策事項。尼泊爾不設歐盟式獨立氟氣體法規。請向NBSM及進口商確認現行NS版本與進口政策。
